reasoning: Financial sector -0.72% and energy sector -1.26% signal risk-off rotation, despite tech +0.59% holding up defensively. XLF weakness is particularly concerning (below -0.5% threshold); XLE is the weakest performer. Tech's marginal outperformance (0.59% vs SPY 0.2%) suggests narrow leadership or defensive positioning, not broad bullish breadth. Combined with overnight gap down -7.36, rising VIX +6.22%, and HIGH IV regime, sector internals lean bearish but divergence limits confidence. Financial stress visible but not unambiguous.
key_observations: XLK: +0.59% — tech holding but only marginally above 0.5% threshold; likely defensive positioning rather than risk-on leadership
XLF: -0.72% — financial sector weakness, below -0.5% threshold; signals credit/yield stress
XLE: -1.26% — energy is weakest performer; no commodity support for SPY
Overall rotation: Asymmetric risk-off (financials + energy down) with tech partially offsetting; not a clean directional call
